category_sources: source_facts.description says text interface for Git repositories; official/manual sources describe Tig as a text-mode interface for Git.

docs_sources: Official homepage and official repository manual source are the best official documentation surfaces identified.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/jonas/tig; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a text interface for Git repositories; source_facts.executables lists tig.
